arts.sum: When Bayern Munich takes the field this Wednesday against FC Barcelona, it will be legendary striker facing off against another...with the added significance that Barça’s man, Robert Lewandowski, was the Bavarian torch-bearer for eight glory-filled years. Now it is Harry Kane wearing the No. 9 for Bayern, and who better to fill those shoes?
